zh.lifeSummary: 當Violante de Aragón於1236年6月8日出生在西班牙迪奧希斯 德 札拉格薩時，她的父親King Jacme de Aragón I28歲，母親Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán22歲。她於1249年1月29日與Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1301年在西班牙納法洛亞奧雷亞加享年65歲，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞奧雷亞加。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Violante de Aragón于1236年6月8日出生在西班牙迪奧希斯 德 札拉格薩时，她的父亲King Jacme de Aragón I28岁，母亲Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán22岁。她于1249年1月29日与Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1301年在西班牙納法洛亞奧雷亞加享年65岁，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞奧雷亞加。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aragón
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Juan, Ruben, Fernando, Jesus, Julio, Luis, Raul, Mario, Alfonso.

Spanish (Aragón) and southern French: habitational name from Aragon, Spain, which was an independent kingdom from 1035 to 1479. It took its name from the river Aragón, which arises in its northwestern corner. The river name may be related to Basque (h)ara(n) ‘valley’; in Basque, Aragon is called Aragoa or Aragoi, which probably means ‘high valley’. Compare Deragon .

variants.name: Deragon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Pierre, Raoul, Rejean.

French: variant of Daragon, habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, denoting someone from Aragon, a region and medieval kingdom in Spain (see Aragon ), or a habitational name for someone from Aragon, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Deragon is very rare in France. Compare Dragon .

variants.name: Aragones
meanings: Spanish (Aragonés): habitational or ethnic name for someone from Aragon (see Aragon ).

variants.name: Aragona
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Ciro, Domenic, Domenico, Gaspare.  Spanish Carolina, Ninfa, Rosario.

Italian (mainly southern): habitational or ethnic name for someone from the former kingdom of Aragon (see   Aragon  ); the surname arrived in Italy in the wake of the Aragonese conquest and domination of southern Italy, which began in 1282.

nameMeanings.name: Violante
meanings: A female name derived from the name Violet. Other forms are Yolante, Yoland, lolantha, lolent. Yolante and Yoland are also found as French names.

en.lifeSummary: When Violante de Aragón was born on 8 June 1236, in Diócesis de Zaragoza, Spain, her father, King Jacme de Aragón I, was 28 and her mother, Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, was 22. She married Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León on 29 January 1249, in Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1301, in Orreaga, Nafarroa, Spain, at the age of 65, and was buried in Orreaga, Nafarroa, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Violante de Aragón est née le 8 juin 1236, à Diócesis de Zaragoza, Espagne, son père, King Jacme de Aragón I, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León le 29 janvier 1249, à Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1301, à Orreaga, Nafarroa, Espagne, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Orreaga, Nafarroa, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Violante de Aragón am 8. Juni 1236 in Diócesis de Zaragoza, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater King Jacme de Aragón I 28 und ihre Mutter Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán 22. Sie hat am 29. Januar 1249 in Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1301 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Orreaga, Nafarroa, Spanien und wurde in Orreaga, Nafarroa, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Violante de Aragón è nata il il 8 giugno 1236 nel Diócesis de Zaragoza, Spagna, sua padre, King Jacme de Aragón I, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León il 29 gennaio 1249, nel Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1301, nel Orreaga, Nafarroa, Spagna, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Orreaga, Nafarroa, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Violante de Aragónが1236年6月8日にスペインディoセシス ド ザラゴザで生まれた時，父King Jacme de Aragón Iは28歳，母Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolánは22歳であった。1249年1月29日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドでRey Alfonso X de Castilla y Leónと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1301年にスペインナファロアオレアガで65歳で死去し，スペインナファロアオレアガにて埋葬された。

ko.Ledesma, Salamanca, Castilla y León, Spa: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 살램아카 레데스마
ko.Santa María La Real de Las Huelgas, Burg: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 버고스 발 데 먼자네도 산타 마i아
ko.Ciudad Real, Ciudad Real, Castilla-La Ma: 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 시우다드 리 시우다드 리
ko.lifeSummary: Violante de Aragón(이)가 1236년 6월 8일 스페인 디o스시스 데 자라고자에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 King Jacme de Aragón I(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1249년 1월 29일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드에서 Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 스페인 나파로 오리가에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 나파로 오리가에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Violante de Aragón nasceu em 8 de junho de 1236, em Diócesis de Zaragoza, Espanha, seu pai, King Jacme de Aragón I, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León em 29 de janeiro de 1249, em Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1301, em Orreaga, Nafarroa, Espanha, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Orreaga, Nafarroa, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Violante de Aragón родилась 8 июня 1236 г. в местности диoсесис де зарагоза, Испания, её отцу по имени King Jacme de Aragón I было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León 29 января 1249 г. в местности валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1301 г. в местности оррига, нафарроа, Испания в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности оррига, нафарроа, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Violante de Aragón nació el 8 de junio de 1236, en Diócesis de Zaragoza, España, su papá, King Jacme de Aragón I, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Reina de Aragón Árpád-házi Jolán, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Rey Alfonso X de Castilla y León el 29 de enero de 1249, en Valladolid, Castilla y León, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1301, en Roncesvalles, Navarra, España, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Roncesvalles, Navarra, España.
